explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 53 from a base nutrition score of 53. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: portable, practical snack food

topPros.explanation: They can hold up better than many snack foods.

topPros.explanation: That keeps them cleaner than most processed snacks.

reviewChecklist: Verify nutrient values are sourced well enough for publishable use.
Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.
Confirm subtitle density stays readable at phone speed.
Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.

nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.
